title: Roche (disambiguation)
content:
'''Roche''' can refer to:

==Canon==
*The '''[[Roche Asteroid Field]]''', an [[asteroid field]] in the [[Mid Rim Territories|Mid Rim]] of [[the galaxy]]
*The [[Roche Hive Mechanical Apparatus Design and Construction Activity for Those Who Need the Hive's Machines|'''Roche Hive Mechanical Apparatus Design and Construction Activity for Those Who Need the Hive's Machines''']], a droid manufacturer
*The '''[[Roche Foundation Prize]]''', an award

==Legends==
*The '''[[Roche sector/Legends|Roche sector]]''' in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]
**The '''[[Roche system]]''' in this sector
***'''[[Roche (star)|Roche]]''', the system's central star
***The '''[[Roche asteroid field]]''', home of the [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] species
*'''[[Roche Hive Mechanical Apparatus Design and Construction Activity for Those Who Need the Hive's Machines/Legends|Roche Hive Mechanical Apparatus Design and Construction Activity for Those Who Need the Hive's Machines]]''', a droid-manufacturing company founded and run by the Verpine

==Out-of-universe==
*'''[[Tudi Roche]]''', a voice actor who worked on ''[[Star Wars Resistance]]''

{{Disambig}}
